name: Life Time Group Holdings, Inc.
business: Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. sells premium health, fitness, and wellness experiences through a network of resort-like athletic country club destinations. Members pay monthly membership dues for access to facilities, classes, and services. The company targets affluent individuals, couples, and families.

exposures.sentence: We are continuing to invest in our digital capabilities, including artificial intelligence such as L AI C, our first generative, artificial intelligence driven healthy way of life personal companion with personalized content and recommendations
We have also been executing on enhanced offerings to accelerate growth beyond our centers, including selling our LTH nutritional products more broadly on e-commerce platforms.
Our MIORA performance and longevity health offering includes comprehensive assessments, proprietary therapies, supplements and recovery and rejuvenation tools.
qualified base memberships that can be purchased at a reduced rate and which may be subsidized through partnerships with third party administrators including certain medical insurance providers

catalysts.event: Target to open 12 to 14 new center locations per year starting in 2026.
catalysts.sentence: We are now targeting 12 to 14 new locations on average per year starting in 2026.

catalysts.event: Several qualified membership programs expire in 2026 if not renewed.
catalysts.sentence: Several qualified membership programs expire in 2026 if not renewed.
